description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named GitHub CI that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Run multiple jobs on different environments: osx_13_x86 on macos-13, osx_14_arm64 on macos-14, and several ubuntu-latest jobs for conda_asan, conda_ubsan, conda_tsan, conda_debuggmp. Also, run a windows_2022 job with a custom setup and a binder_cache job on ubuntu-latest that only runs on the master branch, which caches a binder build on mybinder.org.
